refnamediv.refpurpose: Return the geometry as a KML element.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Return the geometry as a Keyhole Markup Language (KML) element. default maximum number of decimal places is 15, default namespace is no prefix.

warning.para: Using the maxdecimaldigits parameter can cause output geometry to become invalid. To avoid this use with a suitable gridsize first.

note.para: Requires PostGIS be compiled with Proj support. Use to confirm you have proj support compiled in.
Availability: 1.2.2 - later variants that include version param came in 1.3.2
Enhanced: 2.0.0 - Add prefix namespace, use default and named args
AsKML output will not work with geometries that do not have an SRID

refsection.title: Examples
